summary: Read-only plan classification for hydrated cluster refs #89950 and #90079. #89950 remains the live canonical issue. #90079 is a related draft contributor PR that appears to address the same Discord native /compact empty visible reply path, but it is not merge-ready and must not be used for fixed-by-candidate closeout because real behavior proof is failing and the PR is draft.

actions.reason: #89950 is the best surviving canonical thread for the reported Discord native /compact visible reply bug.
#90079 is related to the canonical issue and may be the eventual fix path, but draft status and failing real behavior proof block merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout in this plan.
